evals.prompt: In D:\\_Project\\xd-drawing-system, start the first feature for the ACC project creation modal and project list. Do not implement yet. Prepare the documents needed before planning gate.
evals.expected_output: Creates or proposes the 7 core docs plus optional UI workflow docs, links requirements to tasks and tests, and stops before implementation.

evals.prompt: We only have SPEC.md and a feature-note for a small UI slice. Can we start coding now?
evals.expected_output: Does not start coding; explains required docs or thin-slice exception conditions, then directs to planning-gate.
